Claim every document created anonymously with the given edit_token.

Typical flow:
  1. `pura push --stdin < note.md` (anon) → prints an edit_token
  2. `pura auth login`                      → sign in
  3. `pura claim <edit_token>`              → all anon docs show up under your handle

Prerequisites: the signed-in user must already have a public handle set.
Use the dashboard or `pura config set handle` to pick one first.

Usage:
  pura claim <edit_token> [flags]

Examples:
  pura claim sk_pur_deadbeef01234567890abcdef0123456

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for claim

Global Flags:
      --api-url string   Override API endpoint
      --handle string    User handle (accepts alice or @alice; defaults to _)
      --jq string        Filter JSON output with jq expression
      --json             Force JSON output
      --profile string   Use named profile
      --quiet            Raw data only (no envelope)
      --token string     Override stored token
  -v, --verbose          Verbose output
